name: voice
author: octos
description: OminiX voice skill: ASR, preset-voice TTS with emotion/speed control, and model management via local Qwen3 models on Apple Silicon. For voice cloning and custom voice profiles, use mofa-fm instead.

tools.name: voice_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using Qwen3-ASR (POST /v1/audio/asr/qwen3). Supports WAV, OGG, MP3, FLAC, M4A. Use this when you receive a voice message or need to extract text from audio. Returns the transcribed text.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: voice_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text. Uses Qwen3-TTS when ominix-api is running (high quality, emotion/style control, speed adjustment). Falls back to macOS built-in Say command when ominix-api is unavailable. Produces a WAV/MP3 audio file. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user. NOTE: This tool only supports preset voices. For voice cloning or custom voice profiles, use mofa-fm (fm_tts).

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

output_path.description: Path to save the audio file. Default: auto-generated in OCTOS_WORK_DIR

prompt.description: Style/emotion instruction to control how the voice speaks. Chinese prompts (best with vivian, serena, dylan, uncle_fu): excited='用兴奋激动的语气说话，充满热情和活力', sad='用悲伤失望的语气说话，声音低沉，语速缓慢', cheerful='用开朗愉快的语气说话，声音明亮上扬，节奏轻快', shout='用大声喊叫的方式说话，声音高亢有力，语速快', sarcastic='用讽刺嘲讽的语气说话，语调阴阳怪气，拖长尾音', soft='用温柔轻柔的语气说话', panic='用惊慌恐惧的语气说话，声音颤抖，语速急促'. English prompts (best with ryan, aiden): excited='Speak with excitement and enthusiasm, full of energy', sad='Speak in a sad, disappointed tone, voice low and slow', cheerful='Speak cheerfully with a bright, upbeat voice', soft='Speak gently and softly'. Custom free-form prompts also supported.

speed.description: Speed factor: >1.0 = faster, <1.0 = slower. Range 0.5-2.0. Default: 1.0

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all loaded models and available models in the catalog on the local ominix-api server. Use this to check which ASR/TTS/LLM models are installed and which can be downloaded.

tools.name: download_model
tools.description: Download a model from the catalog to the local machine. Use list_models first to see available model IDs. Downloads can take several minutes for large models.

tools.name: load_model
tools.description: Load a downloaded model into GPU memory for inference. The model must already be downloaded locally.

model.description: Model name or path to load

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload a model from GPU memory to free resources.
